case_title: STAR-WEST METREON, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. VIA MOTO OF METREON, LLC, A CALIFORIA LIMITED et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STAR-WEST METREON, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIA MOTO OF METREON, LLC, A CALIFORIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: (WESTFIELD METREON) STORE, NO.
